mapper.select:
Select * from subject_tbl
and subject_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and subject_category= 1
and subject_category= 2
and subject_category= 3
and subject_level = 1
and subject_level = 2
and subject_level = 3
order by subject_no asc
order by subject_level asc
order by subject_level desc
order by subject_count asc
order by subject_count desc
